title: TONIFUL 52 Pieces 16 Inch Blue Letter A-Z Balloons,Custom Phrase Mylar Foil Alphabet Letter DIY Personalized Phrase Banner for Birthday Anniversary Celebration Graduation Party Supplies Decoration
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES-- Two set of blue A-Z 26 letter balloons with 1pcs straw and 2 pcs ribbons,each foil letter balloon is 16 inches in size,you can customise your phrase with any letter you choose.
MATERIAL-- Material of Letter Helium Balloons is foil,color uniform,beautiful and safe.

CONWENIENCE-- These 16 inch letter balloons have self-sealing valves for easy inflation and deflation. Inflate with a straw or hand pump to fill with air or helium. Please do not overfill the number balloons, 90% air is enough,too full of air will lead to balloon explosion. Each set of letter balloons comes with a straw to help you fill with air and when the balloon needs to be deflated, the straw can be inserted into the inflation hole to release the air.
WIDE RANGE OF USAGE-- These letter foil balloons is a great party decoration for graduation,birthday,wedding,bridal shower,bachelorette,New Year Eve or other party occasions.

CUSTOMISE YOUR PHRASE: This set has 52 letter balloons, you can choose different letters to form the phrase you want. Considering that some letters look very different before and after inflation and are hard to recognise, we have prepared instructions in the pictures on the product details page to help you find the letters you want more intuitively and quickly.
description: From the brand Previous page TONIFUL is a brand that specializes in party decoration products, we want to help everyone have a surprise and unforgettable party. Whether you are organizing a birthday party, wedding celebration, graduation party or any other occasions, we can provide you with the high quality products you need to ensure your satisfaction. A party is a time for people to get together and share happiness. So bring surprise and joy to the party!
